What We Create

Our Craft & Services

Every piece is born from devotion, shaped by skill, and finished with love.

✍️

Akshar Ganapati

Signature name-art fusing Devanagari calligraphy with Ganesha — our most beloved offering for gifts and homes.

🖼️

Sacred Paintings

Handpainted Ganesha, Vitthal, Swami, Buddha, and portrait artworks on canvas, board, and paper.

🪔

Framed Artworks

Gallery-quality framed pieces in wooden and glass frames — ready to hang and radiate blessings.

🎁

Custom Gift Sets

Mini easel canvases, personalised name-art gifts for birthdays, weddings, and corporate events.

🎪

Live Art Events

Live Akshar Ganapati sessions at weddings, hotels, and corporate events — crafted in your presence.

🎨

Silhouette & Abstract

Family silhouette paintings, sunset scenes, and decorative art sets for modern interior spaces.

Our Story

About Akshar Ganapati Arts

Jay Ganesh 🙏

Crafting Devotion,
One Stroke at a Time

Kalakar Rohit B. Bagwe is the founder and artist behind Akshar Ganapati Arts, Pune. With over a decade of dedication to sacred Indian art, Rohit has made a name for himself through his signature Akshar Ganapati technique — where Devanagari letters form the divine silhouette of Lord Ganesha.

From intimate pooja-room paintings to live art events at The Ritz-Carlton, Pune, his work spans scales and spaces while maintaining the same devotional spirit. He specialises in sacred paintings, portraits, calligraphy, silhouette art, and personalised gift sets.

Every artwork from this studio is a one-of-a-kind original — signed, blessed, and delivered with care. Custom orders for birthdays, weddings, and corporate gifting are warmly welcomed.
